description: After repeats, candidate is generically confused — 'What is an ERP? I don't know.' Under the still_confused contract the Judge keeps clarifying and flags candidate_still_confused; the State Engine (still_confused_count already 2) owns the escalation to acknowledge-and-advance — the Judge no longer self-escalates on the count. From session 7970e91c turn 622.

judge_input.active_question_text: Using your primary iPaaS (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Boomi), how would you implement a near-real-time order sync from Salesforce to an on-prem ERP?

active_question_rubric.excellent: Concrete iPaaS components, secure connectivity, reliability controls.

judge_input.active_question_evaluation_hint: Verify platform-specific depth and reliability controls.

active_question_signal_metadata.value: 5+ years hands-on production experience with at least one iPaaS/ESB platform (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Dell Boomi)

active_question_remaining_probes.0: How would you handle retries and idempotency?
active_question_remaining_probes.1: What connectivity approach would you use to reach on-prem?

5+ years hands-on production experience.signal_value: 5+ years hands-on production experience with at least one iPaaS/ESB platform (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Dell Boomi)

recent_turns.text: Using your primary iPaaS, tell me about integrating Salesforce with an on-prem ERP.
Uh huh Okay Uh, what is an ERP?
